headline: NRG Energy to Post Q1 Earnings: What to Expect From the Stock?
summary: NRG Energy heads into Q1 earnings with revenue growth expected from LS Power assets and rising data center demand.

headline: NRG Energy: Too Cheap Into Q1 Earnings, But There's A Technical Risk (Upgrade)
summary: NRG Energy is upgraded to a Buy, capitalizing on AI-driven electrification and robust long-term growth guidance. Read more on NRG stock here.
